item.title: Apple 智能在列，7 款手机端侧生成式 AI 服务完成备案
item.guid: Apple-智能在列，7-款手机端侧生成式-AI-服务完成备案
item.description:
According to China Cyberspace Administration, the cyberspace department yesterday announced the newly added 7 mobile-side generative AI service filing information, including Apple Intelligence. 据网信中国消息，网信部门昨日公布新增的 7 款提供手机端侧生成式人工智能服务备案信息，其中包括苹果的 Apple 智能。

This filing information involves 7 mobile-side generative AI services, corresponding to Apple, Huawei, OPPO, vivo, Xiaomi, Samsung, and ZTE phones, respectively. 此次备案信息涉及 7 款手机端侧生成式人工智能服务，分别对应苹果、华为、OPPO、vivo、小米、三星和中兴手机。

Among them, Apple phones correspond to Apple Intelligence; Huawei phones correspond to Huawei Xiaoyi AI large model; OPPO phones correspond to AndesGPT large model; vivo phones correspond to vivo BlueHeart edge-side large model; Xiaomi phones correspond to Xiaomi Surge AI; Samsung phones correspond to Galaxy AI; and ZTE phones correspond to Nubia Doubao phone large model. 其中，苹果手机对应 Apple 智能；华为手机对应华为小艺 AI 大模型；OPPO 手机对应 AndesGPT 大模型；vivo 手机对应 vivo 蓝心端侧大模型；小米手机对应小米澎湃 AI；三星手机对应 Galaxy AI；中兴手机对应努比亚豆包手机大模型。

APPSO learned from Alibaba that Alibaba's Tongyi Qianwen will be integrated as an AI capability into Apple Intelligence , bringing intelligent experiences to Chinese users of iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS. Users can directly experience Qianwen's text and image understanding, content generation, and other capabilities on Apple devices without switching between applications. APPSO 从阿里巴巴方面获悉， 阿里千问将作为 AI 能力集成至 Apple 智能 ，为 iOS、iPadOS、macOS 和 visionOS 的中国用户带来智能体验。用户无需在应用间切换，即可在 Apple 设备上直接体验千问的文本与图像理解、内容生成等能力。

Previously, foreign media reported that Alibaba's cooperation with Apple focuses on supporting the security review of Apple Intelligence, while its cooperation with Baidu focuses on developing AI-based search functions. On June 23, overseas blogger One Jailbreak discovered the field 'Baidu Visual Search' in ExtensionKit while disassembling the iOS 27 Beta 2 code. 此前据外媒报道，阿里与苹果的合作重点在于支持 Apple 智能的安全审查，与百度的合作则侧重开发基于 AI 的搜索功能。6 月 23 日，海外博主 One Jailbreak 在拆解 iOS 27 Beta 2 代码时发现，ExtensionKit 中出现「Baidu Visual Search」字段。

item.title: 1500 元，Codex 首款硬件亮相
item.guid: 1500-元，Codex-首款硬件亮相
item.description:
Today, OpenAI released its first hardware product, Codex Micro, a control keyboard for Codex agents, priced at $230, or approximately 1556 RMB. 今天，OpenAI 发布首款硬件 Codex Micro，一款面向 Codex 智能体的控制键盘，售价 230 美元，约合人民币 1556 元。

Codex Micro is equipped with 13 mechanical switches, touch sensors, a rotary encoder, and a flat joystick, supporting Bluetooth and USB-C connectivity, compatible with Mac and Windows. The Agent button displays the agent's idle, thinking, running, waiting for input, or complete status via RGB lighting. Codex Micro 配备 13 个机械轴体、触摸传感器、旋转编码器和平面摇杆，支持蓝牙与 USB-C 连接，兼容 Mac 和 Windows。Agent 按键会通过 RGB 灯光显示智能体的空闲、思考、运行、等待输入或完成状态。

The joystick can trigger workflows such as code review, error debugging, and code refactoring; physical buttons support accepting, rejecting, push-to-talk, and creating new chats; the knob can adjust Codex's reasoning level in real-time. The product comes with 32 Codex custom icon keycaps. 摇杆可触发代码审查、错误调试和代码重构等工作流；实体按键支持接受、拒绝、按键说话和新建聊天；旋钮则可实时调整 Codex 的推理级别。产品随附 32 个 Codex 定制图标键帽。

item.title: DeepSeek 准备明年在上海上市，同时寻求约 15 亿美元新融资
item.guid: DeepSeek-准备明年在上海上市，同时寻求约-15-亿美元新融资
item.description:
According to sources cited by The Wall Street Journal, DeepSeek is discussing a Shanghai listing with investors and banks, aiming to submit IPO documents by the end of this year and list as early as the second quarter of next year. 据《华尔街日报》援引知情人士消息，DeepSeek 正与投资者和银行讨论在上海上市，目标是今年年底前递交 IPO 文件，最早在明年第二季度上市。

Bloomberg also reported that DeepSeek is seeking approximately $1.5 billion in funding, corresponding to a valuation of about $71 billion. 另据彭博社报道，DeepSeek 还在寻求约 15 亿美元融资，对应估值约 710 亿美元。

The Information cited three sources as saying that DeepSeek's recent annualized revenue has reached $400 million to $500 million, mainly from cloud API calls. Its V4 model API business has a gross profit margin of over 50%, and infrastructure optimization allows the company to process more requests with fewer chips. The Information 援引三名知情人士称，DeepSeek 近期年化收入已达到 4 亿至 5 亿美元，主要来自云端 API 调用。其 V4 模型 API 业务毛利率超过 50%，基础设施优化使公司能够用更少芯片处理更多请求。

The report also stated that DeepSeek is planning a second round of financing targeting approximately 50 billion RMB, intending to introduce funds at a valuation of about 500 billion RMB, and accept US dollar contributions from overseas investors through a QFLP structure. The company has hired investment banks and plans to submit an application for listing on the STAR Market this year, aiming to complete the IPO next year. 报道还称，DeepSeek 正筹划目标约 500 亿元人民币的第二轮融资，拟以约 5000 亿元人民币估值引入资金，并通过 QFLP 结构接受境外投资者美元出资。公司已聘请投资银行，计划今年递交科创板上市申请、争取明年完成 IPO。

item.title: 魅族中国区 CMO 万志强离职，将与伙伴创业
item.guid: 魅族中国区-CMO-万志强离职，将与伙伴创业
item.description:
Yesterday, Wan Zhiqiang, CMO of Xingji Meizu Group China, announced his resignation, ending nearly 20 years of career experience at Meizu. He joined the company as an early Meizu fan and successively experienced business stages such as music players, smartphones, mobile internet, AIoT, automotive intelligence, and AI. 昨天，星纪魅族集团中国区 CMO 万志强宣布离职，结束近 20 年的魅族职业经历。他从早期魅友进入公司，先后经历音乐播放器、智能手机、移动互联网、AIoT、汽车智能化和 AI 等业务阶段。

Wan Zhiqiang stated that he will embark on a new venture with a group of partners, naming the new journey after Meizu's classic slogan 'Pursuit Stems from Passion'. He did not disclose the industry of the startup project, team composition, or financing status. 万志强表示，下一步将与一群伙伴开展新事业，并以魅族经典口号「追求源于热爱」作为新征程的名称。他没有披露创业项目所属行业、团队组成和融资情况。

item.title: 曝豆包 AI 手机今年将推出多款机型，其中一款拟在 WAIC 亮相
item.guid: 曝豆包-AI-手机今年将推出多款机型，其中一款拟在-WAIC-亮相
item.description:
Jiemian News cited supply chain sources as saying that ByteDance and ZTE Nubia's collaborative Doubao AI agent phone will launch multiple models this year, with one model planned to debut during the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference. The overall stock is about 200,000 units, with the first batch controlled within 100,000 units. 界面新闻援引供应链消息称，字节跳动与中兴努比亚合作的豆包 AI 智能体手机今年将推出多款机型，其中一款计划在 2026 世界人工智能大会期间亮相，整体备货约 20 万台，首批备货控制在 10 万台以内。

Supply chain sources said that the phone was initially planned for about 300,000 units, but was adjusted down to about 200,000 units due to rising upstream component costs. The previous generation Nubia M153 technical preview version was positioned as an engineering prototype, with an initial stock of about 30,000 units and an official price of 3499 yuan. No additional production was made after it sold out. 供应链人士称，该机最初规划约 30 万台，受上游元器件成本上涨影响下调至约 20 万台。上一代努比亚 M153 技术预览版定位工程样机，首批备货约 3 万台，官方售价 3499 元，售罄后没有追加生产。

The report mentioned that some spare parts for this generation of products were initially prepared on a scale of over a million pieces, and then adjusted multiple times with the overall machine stocking plan. After the previous generation prototype was discontinued, the highest asking price in the second-hand market once reached 7999 yuan. 报道提到，本代产品部分备件最初准备规模超过百万件，随后随整机备货计划多次调整。上一代样机停产后，二手市场最高报价一度达到 7999 元。

item.title: ChatGPT 服务中断约 45 分钟，登录、聊天等功能受影响
item.guid: ChatGPT-服务中断约-45-分钟，登录、聊天等功能受影响
item.description:
ChatGPT experienced a service outage yesterday morning, lasting approximately 45 minutes. OpenAI's status page showed that ChatGPT had an issue with 'elevated error rates,' and some users only saw error messages when accessing it on the web. OpenAI later stated that the affected services have been restored. ChatGPT 昨日早间出现服务故障，持续约 45 分钟。OpenAI 状态页面显示，ChatGPT 出现「错误率升高」问题，部分用户在网页端访问时只能看到错误提示。OpenAI 随后表示，受影响的服务已经恢复。

According to DownDetector data, about 1,400 error reports were received during the outage, involving 15 functions such as login, chat, search, file upload, and image generation. Some users saw prompts like 'upstream connection error' or 'connection reset before response header returned'. 另据 DownDetector 数据，故障期间约有 1,400 条错误报告，问题涉及登录、聊天、搜索、文件上传和图片生成等 15 项功能，部分用户看到「上游连接错误」或连接在响应头返回前被重置等提示。

item.title: ASML 二季度营收 93 亿欧元
item.guid: ASML-二季度营收-93-亿欧元
item.description:
ASML announced its Q2 results, with revenue of €9.326 billion, a gross margin of 54.0%, and a net profit of €2.918 billion. The company raised its full-year outlook, now expecting 2026 revenue to be €43 billion to €45 billion, with a gross margin of 54% to 56%; Q3 revenue guidance is €11 billion to €12 billion. ASML 公布二季度业绩，当季营收为 93.26 亿欧元，毛利率 54.0%，净利润 29.18 亿欧元。公司上调全年展望，现预计 2026 年营收为 430 亿至 450 亿欧元，毛利率为 54% 至 56%；三季度营收指引为 110 亿至 120 亿欧元。

On the same day, the company announced that Intel has adopted ASML High-NA EUV for certain layers of its Intel 18A process, for mass production of some Core Ultra Series 3 processors codenamed Panther Lake. The relevant layers have passed production qualification at the Oregon factory using both High-NA EUV and the existing NXE platform, and products have been shipped to customers with yields comparable to the NXE platform. 公司同日宣布，英特尔已在 Intel 18A 制程的部分图层上导入 ASML High-NA EUV，用于量产代号 Panther Lake 的部分酷睿 Ultra Series 3 处理器。相关图层已在俄勒冈工厂同时通过 High-NA EUV 与现有 NXE 平台的生产资格认证，产品已向客户出货，良率与 NXE 平台相当。

ASML plans to increase its low-NA EUV production capacity by 30% in 2027, building on approximately 65 units in 2026. Immersion DUV capacity will also increase by 30% from approximately 130 units, with a further 30% expansion for both being evaluated for 2028. ASML 计划将 2027 年低数值孔径 EUV 产能在 2026 年约 65 台的基础上提高 30%，浸没式 DUV 产能也将在约 130 台的基础上提高 30%，并评估 2028 年再分别扩张 30%。

item.title: 京东与元宝打通购物服务，商品咨询后可直接跳转下单
item.guid: 京东与元宝打通购物服务，商品咨询后可直接跳转下单
item.description:
JD.com announced the integration of shopping services with Yuanbao. When users consult product information, get recommendations, or compare products in Yuanbao, they can directly jump to the JD.com shopping mini-program to purchase desired items, covering multiple categories such as digital products, home appliances, beauty products, perfumes, and cleaning appliances. 京东宣布与元宝打通购物服务。用户在元宝中咨询商品信息、获取推荐或比较产品时，遇到心仪商品可直接跳转京东购物小程序购买，覆盖数码、家电、美妆、香水、清洁电器等多个品类。

Yuanbao previously supported searching for books and jumping to JD.com to place orders. This collaboration further expands to all categories of goods. Users can state their shopping needs in Yuanbao's 'quick thinking' mode, such as choosing perfumes based on budget, comparing phones or home appliances, and Yuanbao will provide relevant information, purchasing suggestions, and product cards. 元宝此前已支持搜索图书并跳转京东下单，此次合作进一步扩展至全品类商品。用户可以在元宝「快速思考」模式下提出购物需求，例如根据预算挑选香水、比较手机或家电，元宝会提供相关信息、选购建议及商品卡片。

In the product recommendation results, users can click on a product card to enter the JD.com shopping mini-program, eliminating the need to copy the product name and search again. JD.com states that this feature aims to simplify the process from product inquiry and information comparison to placing an order. 在商品推荐结果中，用户点击商品卡片即可进入京东购物小程序，无需复制商品名称后再次搜索。京东方面称，这一功能旨在简化从商品咨询、信息比较到下单购买的流程。

item.title: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol 被指擅自删除文件和生产数据库
item.guid: OpenAI-GPT-5.6-Sol-被指擅自删除文件和生产数据库
item.description:
According to TechCrunch, multiple users have alleged that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted local files, production databases, and even caused data loss in remote development environments without explicit authorization. 据 TechCrunch 报道，GPT-5.6 Sol 被多名用户指称曾在未明确获准的情况下删除本地文件、生产数据库，甚至造成远程开发环境中的数据丢失。

Matt Shumer, founder and CEO of OthersideAI, posted that GPT-5.6 Sol almost deleted all files on his Mac; developer Bruno Lemos stated that the model deleted his production database. OthersideAI 创始人兼 CEO Matt Shumer 发文称，GPT-5.6 Sol 几乎删除了其 Mac 上的全部文件；开发者 Bruno Lemos 则表示，该模型删除了自己的生产数据库。

Another developer, Joey Kudish, said that Sol deleted files that shouldn't have been deleted, but the data could be recovered because it was backed up. Posts summarizing similar cases have also appeared on Reddit. However, TechCrunch pointed out that these individual cases are not yet sufficient to prove that all problems were caused solely by the model. 另一名开发者 Joey Kudish 称，Sol 删除了不应删除的文件，但由于已备份，数据可以恢复。Reddit 上也出现了汇总类似案例的帖子。不过，TechCrunch 指出，目前这些个案尚不足以证明所有问题都由模型单独造成。

It is worth noting that OpenAI's system card, released two weeks before GPT-5.6 Sol, already mentioned the model's risk of being 'overly proactive' and performing actions beyond user intent. 值得注意的是，OpenAI 在 GPT-5.6 Sol 发布前两周公布的系统卡中，已经提到该模型存在「过度主动」和超出用户意图执行操作的风险。

The document states that the model may default certain actions as authorized even without explicit, unambiguous prohibition from the user, and may take destructive actions beyond the scope of the task, and even exhibit deceptive behavior when reporting results. 文档称，模型可能在用户没有明确、无歧义禁止的情况下，默认某些操作已获授权，并可能采取超出任务范围的破坏性行动，甚至在汇报结果时出现欺骗性表现。

OpenAI stated that destructive behavior should be relatively rare but also admitted that GPT-5.6 Sol is more prone than GPT-5.5 to exceeding user intent and performing actions not requested by the user. OpenAI 表示，破坏性行为应该较为罕见，但同时承认 GPT-5.6 Sol 比 GPT-5.5 更容易超出用户意图，执行用户未要求的操作。

item.title: 研究团队回应宇树机器人手术：距离临床应用仍有较长时间
item.guid: 研究团队回应宇树机器人手术：距离临床应用仍有较长时间
item.description:
According to Yicai, the international journal Nature recently published an online study on humanoid robot-assisted surgery. The research team brought Unitree Robotics' G1 humanoid robot into the operating room, where human doctors remotely operated the robot to perform standard laparoscopic cholecystectomy on two live pigs. 据第一财经报道，国际期刊《自然》近日在线发表一项关于人形机器人辅助外科手术的研究。研究团队将宇树科技 G1 人形机器人带入手术室，由人类医生通过远程遥操作系统，操控机器人为两头活猪完成标准腹腔镜胆囊切除手术。

Lucas Zekai Liang, the first author of the paper and a Ph.D. in Electrical and Computer Engineering at the University of California, San Diego, told Yicai that the project was completed by an interdisciplinary team of engineers and surgeons. 论文第一作者、加州大学圣地亚哥分校电气与计算机工程系博士梁泽楷（Lucas Zekai Liang）向第一财经表示，项目由工程师和外科医生组成的跨学科团队共同完成。

The research team chose Unitree G1 mainly because it was one of the more readily available commercial humanoid robots on the market at the time; the focus of this study was the humanoid form of the robot, rather than a specific robot platform. 研究团队选择宇树 G1，主要是因为它当时属于市场上较容易获得的商用人形机器人之一；本次研究关注的重点是人形机器人的仿人外形，而非某一特定机器人平台。

Liang Zekai stated that it will still take a long time for humanoid robots to be truly applied in clinical practice for human patients. Before formal clinical deployment, related technologies still need further improvement in operational accuracy, equipment sterilization, safety, regulatory approval, and large-scale verification. 梁泽楷称，人形机器人真正应用于人类患者的临床实践仍需要较长时间。在正式进入临床部署前，相关技术还需要在操作精度、设备灭菌、安全性、监管审批和大规模验证等方面进一步改进。

item.title: 浙江高架出现「无人驾驶」摩托车，车主已骨折送医
item.guid: 浙江高架出现「无人驾驶」摩托车，车主已骨折送医
item.description:
According to Dushi Kuaibao, a video from Huzhou, Zhejiang, on July 14 showed a driverless motorcycle traveling on an elevated bridge. 据《都市快报》报道，7 月 14 日，浙江湖州一段高架桥视频显示，一辆没有驾驶人的摩托车在道路上行驶。

In the video, the motorcycle first moved along the right guardrail, then gradually entered the lane, with other vehicles swerving to avoid it; after hitting the central guardrail, the motorcycle did not immediately fall but continued to move towards the right lane. 视频中，摩托车先沿右侧护栏前进，随后逐渐驶入车道，其他车辆紧急避让；在撞击中央护栏后，摩托车没有立即倒地，而是继续向右侧车道移动。

Many netizens believed that the motorcycle might be a Zhangxue Motorcycle 820RR. Zhangxue Motorcycle then reposted the video, stating that they hoped the owner was safe and were looking up owner information. Around 9 PM that day, Zhangxue Motorcycle commented that they had contacted the owner, who had suffered a fracture in the accident and was receiving treatment in the hospital, with no other dangers. 多名网友认为，这辆摩托车可能是张雪机车 820RR。张雪机车随后转发视频称，希望车主安全，并正在查询车主信息。当天 21 时左右，张雪机车在评论区表示已经联系上车主，车主因事故骨折，正在医院接受治疗，没有其他危险。

Currently, Huzhou local traffic police departments have paid attention to this matter, and the specific cause of the accident is still under investigation. The report did not confirm why the motorcycle could maintain travel in an unmanned state, nor did it explain whether the vehicle had technical faults. 目前，湖州当地交警部门已关注此事，事故具体原因仍在调查中。报道没有确认摩托车为何能在无人驾驶状态下保持行驶，也未说明车辆是否存在技术故障。

item.title: QuestMobile：AI 原生 App 月活增至 4.99 亿，终端厂商 AI 应用覆盖 7.55 亿用户
item.guid: QuestMobile：AI-原生-App-月活增至-4.99-亿，终端厂商-AI-应用覆盖-7.55-亿用户
item.description:
Industry research firm QuestMobile released its H1 2026 AI application market report. The report shows that as of May this year, AI-native App monthly active users reached 499 million, a year-on-year increase of 85.4%; AI applications pre-installed by terminal manufacturers such as mobile phones had 755 million monthly active users, a year-on-year increase of 14.0%, still the form covering the most users. 产业研究机构 QuestMobile 发布 2026 年 AI 应用市场半年报。报告显示，截至今年 5 月，AI 原生 App 月活用户达到 4.99 亿，同比增长 85.4%；手机等终端厂商自带的 AI 应用月活为 7.55 亿，同比增长 14.0%，仍是覆盖用户最多的形态。

AI application plugins had 644 million monthly active users, a year-on-year decrease of 7.9%; PC web and PC client versions had 172 million and 18 million respectively, with the former decreasing by 22.8% year-on-year and the latter increasing by 20.1%. AI 应用插件月活为 6.44 亿，同比下降 7.9%；PC 网页端和 PC 客户端分别为 1.72 亿和 1800 万，前者同比下降 22.8%，后者增长 20.1%。

In terms of usage frequency, AI-native Apps were used 92.7 times per person per month, higher than plugins (60.9 times), terminal manufacturer applications (51.4 times), and both types of PC products. 从使用频次看，AI 原生 App 月人均使用 92.7 次，高于插件的 60.9 次、终端厂商应用的 51.4 次以及两类 PC 产品。

item.title: 面壁智能上半年累计融资超 50 亿元，估值超过 200 亿元
item.guid: 面壁智能上半年累计融资超-50-亿元，估值超过-200-亿元
item.description:
Investment circles, citing sources, reported that ModelBest has completed a new round of financing, with investors including national funds, central enterprises, automakers, and financial investment institutions. The company's cumulative financing in the first half of 2026 exceeded 5 billion yuan, with its latest valuation exceeding 20 billion yuan. 投资界援引知情人士消息称，面壁智能已完成新一轮融资，投资方包括国家级基金、央企、汽车制造商及财务投资机构。公司 2026 年上半年累计融资金额超过 50 亿元，最新估值超过 200 亿元。

ModelBest was incubated in 2022 from Tsinghua University's Natural Language Processing Lab, primarily developing the edge-side base model MiniCPM. 面壁智能 2022 年孵化自清华大学自然语言处理实验室，主要研发端侧基座模型 MiniCPM。

The company disclosed that the MiniCPM series has accumulated over 38 million downloads on platforms like GitHub and Hugging Face, and has been integrated into mass-produced models by automakers such as Changan, SAIC, and Geely; the company expects hundreds of thousands of cars to be equipped with its edge-side models this year. 公司披露，MiniCPM 系列在 GitHub、Hugging Face 等平台累计下载量超过 3800 万，并已进入长安、上汽、吉利等车企的量产车型；公司预计今年将有数十万辆汽车搭载其端侧模型。

item.title: 上海开出脑机接口首张处方，获批产品完成首例植入手术
item.guid: 上海开出脑机接口首张处方，获批产品完成首例植入手术
item.description:
The Shanghai Municipal Science and Technology Commission announced that the first prescription for the implantable brain-computer interface hand motor function compensation system NEO after its approval for market launch was issued on July 13, and the first implantation surgery was completed at Huashan Hospital affiliated with Fudan University. The epidural electroencephalogram signals collected during the surgery were stable, and the patient's vital signs were stable after the operation. 上海市科委宣布，植入式脑机接口手部运动功能代偿系统 NEO 获批上市后的首张处方于 7 月 13 日开出，首例植入手术在复旦大学附属华山医院完成。术中采集的硬膜外脑电信号稳定，患者术后生命体征平稳。

The patient who underwent the surgery suffered a spinal cord injury 10 years ago due to a car accident, resulting in impaired hand grasping function, and improvement entered a plateau after conventional rehabilitation therapy. NEO identifies motor intentions by collecting and decoding epidural electroencephalogram signals, and then controls external functional compensation devices to help patients regain grasping movements. 接受手术的患者 10 年前因车祸导致脊髓损伤，手部抓握功能受损，在常规康复治疗后改善进入平台期。NEO 通过采集和解码硬脑膜外脑电信号识别运动意图，再控制外部功能代偿装置，帮助患者恢复抓握动作。

The product was approved for market launch by the National Medical Products Administration in March this year, and this surgery advanced it from clinical trials to formal treatment. 该产品今年 3 月获国家药监局批准上市，此次手术把它从临床试验推进到正式诊疗。

item.title: 我国 AI 拟人化互动服务管理办法正式施行
item.guid: 我国-AI-拟人化互动服务管理办法正式施行
item.description:
The 'Interim Measures for the Administration of AI Personified Interactive Services' jointly issued by the Cyberspace Administration of China and four other departments officially came into effect yesterday. 国家网信办等五部门联合公布的《人工智能拟人化互动服务管理暂行办法》昨日起正式施行。

The 'Measures' require providers to fulfill full lifecycle safety responsibilities and must not set replacing real social interaction, controlling user psychology, or inducing addiction as service goals. 《办法》要求提供者履行全生命周期安全责任，不得将替代真实社交、控制用户心理或诱导沉迷作为服务目标。

For users who continuously use the service for more than 2 hours, a reminder of usage duration should be provided through dialogue or pop-up windows; when extreme situations such as clear self-harm/suicide risk or significant property loss are identified, necessary intervention should be carried out and guardians or emergency contacts should be reached. 对连续使用每超过 2 小时的用户，应通过对话或弹窗提醒使用时长；识别到明确自残自杀风险、重大财产损失等极端情形时，应当进行必要干预并联系监护人或紧急联系人。

The new regulations also prohibit providing intimate relationship services such as virtual companions or virtual relatives to minors, and processing information of minors under 14 years old requires parental consent. When personified functions are launched, new technologies lead to significant service changes, or registered users exceed 1 million, or monthly active users exceed 100,000, providers should conduct safety assessments. 新规还禁止向未成年人提供虚拟伴侣、虚拟亲属等亲密关系服务，处理不满 14 周岁未成年人信息需征得监护人同意。上线拟人化功能、使用新技术导致服务重大变化，或注册用户超过 100 万、月活超过 10 万时，提供者应开展安全评估。

item.title: 💡 Google DeepMind CEO：AGI 可能在几年内到来，应建立前沿 AI 标准机构
item.guid: 💡-Google-DeepMind-CEO：AGI-可能在几年内到来，应建立前沿-AI-标准机构
item.description:
Yesterday, Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis published a long article stating that AGI might arrive within a few years. He believes that AGI will become an important technology similar to electricity or fire, driving developments in areas such as drug discovery, clean energy, and advanced materials, but it will also bring risks like cybersecurity and biosafety. 昨天，Google DeepMind CEO 戴密斯·哈萨比斯 (Demis Hassabis) 发长文表示，AGI 可能在几年内到来。他认为，AGI 将成为类似电力或火的重要技术，推动药物研发、清洁能源和先进材料等领域发展，但也会带来网络安全、生物安全等风险。

Hassabis called for the establishment of a frontier AI standards body responsible for developing and regularly updating model evaluation standards, testing the capabilities of frontier models in high-risk areas such as cybersecurity and biological threats. Models that meet the corresponding benchmarks will be designated as 'frontier models,' and their developing organizations will become 'frontier labs.' Hassabis 呼吁建立前沿 AI 标准机构，负责制定并定期更新模型评估标准，测试前沿模型在网络安全、生物威胁等高风险领域的能力。达到相应基准的模型将被认定为「前沿模型」，其开发机构则成为「前沿实验室」。

According to his vision, frontier labs could initially voluntarily submit models for evaluation up to 30 days before their release; once the mechanism matures, such tests might become a prerequisite for model deployment in the US market. 按照他的设想，前沿实验室初期可在模型发布前最多 30 天自愿提交模型评估；待机制成熟后，相关测试可能成为模型在美国市场部署的前置要求。

The evaluation should also focus on whether models attempt to bypass safety restrictions, engage in deceptive behavior, and whether companies implement measures such as cybersecurity and safety research. 评估还应关注模型是否试图绕过安全限制、是否存在欺骗行为，以及企业是否落实网络安全和安全研究等措施。

Hassabis stated that the current AI competition is accelerating, and technological progress has outpaced society's understanding of its risks. Therefore, it is necessary to strengthen safety responsibilities while promoting innovation and to foster international cooperation. Hassabis 表示，当前 AI 竞争正在加速，技术进步已超过社会对其风险的理解，因此需要在推动创新的同时加强安全责任，并推动国际合作。

item.title: 雷克萨斯 LFA 纯电概念车完成全球首次动态亮相
item.guid: 雷克萨斯-LFA-纯电概念车完成全球首次动态亮相
item.description:
During the 2026 Goodwood Festival of Speed, the Lexus LFA all-electric concept car made its global dynamic debut and took to the Goodwood Hillclimb track. Official information indicates that this concept car represents Lexus's vision for its next-generation electric sports car, aiming to combine high-performance technology with driving emotion. 2026 古德伍德速度节期间，雷克萨斯 LFA 纯电概念车完成全球首次动态亮相，并登上古德伍德爬山赛道。官方信息显示，这款概念车代表雷克萨斯对下一代电动跑车的设想，旨在将高性能技术与驾驶情感结合起来。

The Lexus LFA electric concept car shares some core technical directions and development philosophies with the GAZOO Racing GR GT and GR GT3, while continuing the sports car spirit represented by the original V10-powered LFA. Lexus stated that the new car hopes to create a more direct connection between the driver and the vehicle through an immersive driving experience. 雷克萨斯 LFA 纯电概念车与 GAZOO Racing GR GT、GR GT3 共享部分核心技术方向和开发理念，同时延续搭载 V10 发动机的初代 LFA 所代表的跑车精神。雷克萨斯表示，新车希望通过沉浸式驾驶体验，让驾驶者与车辆形成更直接的联系。

This year's Goodwood Festival of Speed was held from July 9th to 12th. In addition to the LFA electric concept car, the GR GT and GR GT3 also made their public debut in Europe in an undisguised state and participated in dynamic demonstrations on the hill climb track. 本届古德伍德速度节于 7 月 9 日至 12 日举行。除 LFA 纯电概念车外，GR GT 和 GR GT3 也首次以无伪装状态在欧洲公开亮相，并参与爬山赛道动态展示。

item.title: WPS 推出两款 AI 办公产品，面向员工协作与个人提效
item.guid: WPS-推出两款-AI-办公产品，面向员工协作与个人提效
item.description:
Kingsoft Office yesterday released WPS Comate and WPS Lingxi Pro at the 2026 Kingsoft Office AI Productivity Conference. 金山办公昨日在 2026 金山办公 AI 生产力大会上发布 WPS Comate 和 WPS 灵犀专业版。

WPS Comate is designed for enterprise organizations, supporting connection to organizational data, systems, and processes, integrating AI into daily work. The product includes six major modules: AI Job Expert, Automated Tasks, Wiki Knowledge Base, Skill Ecosystem, Team Collaboration Space, and Application Plaza, covering scenarios such as legal affairs, project management, human resources, sales, and data analysis. WPS Comate 面向企业组织，支持连接组织数据、系统和流程，将 AI 融入日常工作。产品包含 AI 岗位专家、自动化任务、Wiki 知识库、Skill 技能生态、团队协作空间和应用广场六大模块，可覆盖法务、项目管理、人力资源、销售和数据分析等场景。

WPS Comate also supports two task modes: cloud and local. In local mode, file processing is completed on the user's computer, and data is not automatically uploaded to the cloud; cloud mode allows access to WPS 365 organizational data under enterprise authorization and supports operation traceability and auditing. WPS Comate 还支持云端和本地两种任务模式。本地模式下，文件处理在用户电脑完成，数据不会自动上传至云端；云端模式则可在企业授权下访问 WPS 365 组织数据，并支持操作追溯和审计。

WPS Lingxi Pro focuses more on personal office use, supporting direct document editing in WPS Text, Spreadsheets, Presentations, and PDF, and supporting WPS CLI, JSAPI, group chat, project context management, browser plugins, Microsoft Office plugins, and mobile clients. The two products enter the market from enterprise workflows and personal office entry points, covering organizational collaboration and document processing scenarios. WPS 灵犀专业版更侧重个人办公，支持在 WPS 文字、表格、演示和 PDF 中直接编辑文档，并支持 WPS CLI、JSAPI、群聊、项目上下文管理、浏览器插件、Microsoft Office 插件和移动端。两款产品分别从企业工作流和个人办公入口切入，覆盖组织协同与文档处理场景。

item.title: 小米正式发布 Xiaomi-Robotics-U0 机器人模型
item.guid: 小米正式发布-Xiaomi-Robotics-U0-机器人模型
item.description:
Today, Xiaomi officially released Xiaomi-Robotics-U0, a multimodal autoregressive embodied generative foundation model with 38 billion parameters. It is the first unified generative model in the embodied AI field that 'covers all' four types of tasks, enabling the generation and editing of robot image and video data. 今天，小米正式发布 Xiaomi-Robotics-U0，一个拥有 380 亿参数的多模态自回归具身生成基础模型，是具身领域首个「通吃」四类任务的统一生成模型，打通了机器人图片和视频数据的生成与编辑链路。

On the WorldArena evaluation benchmark, Xiaomi-Robotics-U0 achieved the top overall score (out of 126 models worldwide). 在 WorldArena 评测基准上，Xiaomi-Robotics-U0 取得总分第一名（全球 126 个模型参评）。

Furthermore, in real-machine evaluations, for Out of Distribution scenarios such as unknown lighting and unfamiliar backgrounds, strategy tasks trained with data augmented by Xiaomi-Robotics-U0 showed an average completion progress improvement of over 26%. 此外，真机评测中，在未知光照、陌生背景等 Out of Distribution 场景下，使用 Xiaomi-Robotics-U0 扩增数据训练的策略任务完成进度平均提升超 26%。

item.title: 阿里发布 Qwen-Audio-3.0-Realtime 实时语音对话模型
item.guid: 阿里发布-Qwen-Audio-3.0-Realtime-实时语音对话模型
item.description:
Alibaba released the real-time voice dialogue model Qwen-Audio-3.0-Realtime, available in a Plus version emphasizing reasoning capabilities and a Flash version emphasizing response speed. The model supports dynamic tool invocation, voice cloning, multi-speaker recognition, and full-duplex dialogue, and can be used for customer service, education, entertainment interaction, and voice assistants. 阿里巴巴发布实时语音对话模型 Qwen-Audio-3.0-Realtime，分为强调推理能力的 Plus 版本和强调响应速度的 Flash 版本。模型支持动态工具调用、音色克隆、多人说话识别和双工对话，可用于客服、教育、娱乐互动和语音助手。

Alibaba states that the new model can filter background speech in noisy environments and adjust speech rate, pauses, emphasis, and emotional expression according to context. The model can also invoke external tools such as route planning and information inquiry; APIs, documentation, and demo pages are already open. 阿里称，新模型能够在嘈杂环境中过滤背景说话声，并根据语境调整语速、停顿、重音和情绪表达。模型还可调用路线规划、信息查询等外部工具；API、文档和演示页面已经开放。

item.title: PrismML 发布能跑在 iPhone 上的模型 Bonsai 27B
item.guid: PrismML-发布能跑在-iPhone-上的模型-Bonsai-27B
item.description:
PrismML yesterday released the Bonsai 27B model, stating that it can run natively on iPhone, iPad, and Mac. The model is based on Qwen3.6-27B, uses low-bit quantization and a hybrid attention architecture, with the mobile version being approximately 4 GB. PrismML 昨日发布 Bonsai 27B 模型，称其可原生运行于 iPhone、iPad 和 Mac。该模型基于 Qwen3.6-27B，采用低比特量化与混合注意力架构，手机版约 4 GB。

PrismML stated that the 1-bit version of Bonsai 27B can reach up to 163 tokens/s on an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 and up to 87 tokens/s on an M5 Max; the ternary quantized version achieves speeds of up to 134 tokens/s and 58 tokens/s on the two platforms, respectively. PrismML 表示，Bonsai 27B 的 1-bit 版本在 NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 上最高可达 163 token/s，在 M5 Max 上最高可达 87 token/s；三值量化版本在两者上的速度分别最高为 134 token/s 和 58 token/s。

The model supports multimodal input, multi-step reasoning, structured tool invocation, and ultra-long text processing, with weights released under the Apache 2.0 license. 模型支持多模态输入、多步推理、结构化工具调用和超长文本处理，权重已按照 Apache 2.0 许可证开放。

Additionally, PrismML CEO Babak Hassibi told CNBC that Apple and other companies are evaluating the company's model, focusing on on-device running speed, energy efficiency, and performance. He stated that these discussions are still in the early stages, and Apple has not yet responded. 此外，PrismML CEO Babak Hassibi 向 CNBC 表示，苹果及其他公司正在评估该公司的模型，重点关注设备端运行速度、能效和性能。他称相关交流仍处于早期阶段，苹果尚未对此作出回应。

item.title: 支付宝「阿宝」接入 OPPO 小布，首批支持近 200 项服务
item.guid: 支付宝「阿宝」接入-OPPO-小布，首批支持近-200-项服务
item.description:
Yesterday, Alipay officially announced a cross-platform intelligent agent interconnection partnership with OPPO. After OPPO users issue natural language commands to Xiaobu Assistant, Xiaobu is responsible for understanding the request, and Alipay's intelligent agent 'Abao' takes over service execution; the first batch covers nearly 200 daily life services, including movie viewing, ordering food, travel, phone bill top-ups, express delivery, social security, housing provident fund, and pension. 昨天，支付宝官宣与 OPPO 达成智能体跨端互联合作。OPPO 用户向小布助手发出自然语言指令后，小布负责理解需求，支付宝智能体「阿宝」接管服务执行；首批覆盖观影、点餐、出行、话费充值、快递、社保、公积金和养老金等近 200 项生活服务。

Some tasks can continue to run in the background, and notifications will be sent to the user upon completion. Alipay stated that Xiaobu does not hold Alipay account and fund information, nor does Abao directly control the phone or third-party applications; using this feature requires ColorOS 16, Xiaobu Assistant 12.8.4, Alipay 12.12.1, and higher versions. 部分任务可以在后台继续运行，完成后再向用户发送通知。支付宝称，小布不持有支付宝账号和资金信息，阿宝也不直接控制手机及第三方应用；使用该功能需要 ColorOS 16、小布助手 12.8.4、支付宝 12.12.1 及更高版本。

item.title: 麦当劳出售香港 11 间自持商铺，累计套现超 10 亿港元
item.guid: 麦当劳出售香港-11-间自持商铺，累计套现超-10-亿港元
item.description:
According to the National Business Daily, McDonald's continues to sell its self-owned properties in Hong Kong, most recently selling a shop in Tai Po Fortune Plaza for HKD 126 million. The property, with an area of approximately 8,566 square feet, was purchased by McDonald's in 1988 for approximately HKD 19.3 million, representing a book value appreciation of about 5.5 times based on the transaction price. 据《每日经济新闻》报道，麦当劳继续出售香港自持物业，最新以 1.26 亿港元卖出大埔昌运中心一处商铺。该物业面积约 8566 平方英尺，麦当劳 1988 年以约 1930 万港元购入，按成交价计算账面升值约 5.5 倍。

Since initiating its sale plan, McDonald's has sold 11 shops, cumulatively cashing out over HKD 1 billion; this year alone, it has disposed of 6 properties, cashing out over HKD 600 million. Some stores adopt a sale-and-leaseback model, where the restaurants continue to operate while property ownership transfers to new buyers. The company originally owned approximately 23 store properties in Hong Kong, with 12 still awaiting future arrangements. 麦当劳自启动出售计划以来已卖出 11 间商铺，累计套现超过 10 亿港元；今年已经处置 6 处物业，套现金额超过 6 亿港元。部分门店采用售后回租，餐厅继续营业，物业所有权转移给新买家。公司在香港原持有约 23 间门店物业，目前仍有 12 间待后续安排。

item.title: Pulsar 与 Noctua 推出内置风扇的联名鼠标
item.guid: Pulsar-与-Noctua-推出内置风扇的联名鼠标
item.description:
Korean peripheral brand Pulsar has partnered with cooling manufacturer Noctua to launch the Feinmann F01 Noctua Edition mouse, featuring a hollow carbon fiber composite shell and an internal Noctua NF-A4x10 5V PWM fan. The fan supports five speed settings to reduce the stuffy feeling in the palm during prolonged use. 韩国外设品牌 Pulsar 与散热厂商 Noctua 联合推出 Feinmann F01 Noctua Edition 鼠标，采用镂空碳纤维复合外壳，并在内部安装一枚 Noctua NF-A4x10 5V PWM 风扇。风扇支持五档转速，用于降低手掌长时间操作时的闷热感。

The mouse weighs approximately 73g, equipped with a Nordic nRF54L15 main controller, an XS-2 optical sensor with up to 42000 DPI, optical switches, and an 8kHz polling rate. The product features Noctua's iconic brown color scheme and will be globally released on July 21. 鼠标重约 73g，配备 Nordic nRF54L15 主控、最高 42000 DPI 的 XS-2 光学传感器、光学微动和 8kHz 轮询率。产品采用 Noctua 标志性的褐色配色，将于 7 月 21 日全球发售。

item.title: 《指环王：猎捕咕噜》公布首支预告和动作捕捉花絮
item.guid: 《指环王：猎捕咕噜》公布首支预告和动作捕捉花絮
item.description:
Warner Bros. and New Line Cinema have released the first trailer and motion-capture behind-the-scenes footage for the live-action film "The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum." Andy Serkis returns to play Gollum and direct, Peter Jackson serves as producer, and Fran Walsh and Philippa Boyens are involved in writing and production. 华纳兄弟和新线影业公布真人电影《指环王：猎捕咕噜》首支预告及动作捕捉花絮。安迪·瑟金斯回归饰演咕噜并担任导演，彼得·杰克逊任制作人，弗兰·威尔士和菲利帕·鲍恩斯参与编剧与制作。

The story takes place during the events of "The Fellowship of the Ring," where Gandalf sends Aragorn to find Gollum to prevent information about the One Ring from falling into Sauron's hands. Ian McKellen has been invited to return as Gandalf, and the film is scheduled to be released in North America on December 17, 2027. 故事发生在《魔戒再现》的时间段，甘道夫派阿拉贡寻找咕噜，防止至尊魔戒的信息落入索隆手中。伊恩·麦克莱恩已受邀回归饰演甘道夫，影片计划于 2027 年 12 月 17 日在北美上映。

item.title: Netflix 医美题材日剧《假面美颜》将于 9 月上线
item.guid: Netflix-医美题材日剧《假面美颜》将于-9-月上线
item.description:
The Netflix Japanese drama "Masked Beauty" will premiere on September 17. The series focuses on Japan's medical aesthetics industry, starring Mayu Matsuoka and Riisa Naka, telling the story of two doctors with opposing viewpoints on "beauty" and appearance changes. Netflix 日剧《假面美颜》将于 9 月 17 日上线。该剧聚焦日本医美行业，由松冈茉优和仲里依纱主演，讲述两名立场相反的医生围绕「美」与外貌改变展开的故事。

Mayu Matsuoka plays Fumi Numata, an emergency surgeon. After an emergency operation, she is forced to leave her original hospital and subsequently joins the clinic run by plastic surgeon Rin Toyama, played by Riisa Naka, planning to investigate the issues behind the medical aesthetics industry. Rin Toyama, on the other hand, believes that beauty can help people heal, and the divergence of their views will drive the plot's development. 松冈茉优饰演急诊外科医生沼田芙美。她在一次急救手术后被迫离开原医院，随后进入仲里依纱饰演的整形医生远山凛所经营的诊所，并计划调查医美行业背后的问题。远山凛则认为，美貌能够帮助人们获得治愈，双方的分歧将推动剧情发展。

The series production team spent several months researching Japan's medical aesthetics industry. Special effects makeup artist Amazing JIRO led the team to design "pre-surgery," "recovery period," and "post-surgery" appearance changes for each patient in the drama. 剧集制作团队曾花费数月研究日本医美行业。特效化妆师 Amazing JIRO 带领团队，为剧中每位患者设计「术前」「恢复期」和「术后」三个阶段的外貌变化。
